prompts.description: Remove trailing → arrows from onboarding CTA labels
prompts.prompt:
In `components/onboarding.tsx`, remove the trailing ` →` from three CTA button labels.

Make exactly these three replacements:

1. Find: `Continue — {activityLevels.find(l => l.id === selectedActivityLevel)?.label} →`
   Replace with: `Continue — {activityLevels.find(l => l.id === selectedActivityLevel)?.label}`

2. Find: `Continue — {goals.find(g => g.id === selectedGoal)?.label} →`
   Replace with: `Continue — {goals.find(g => g.id === selectedGoal)?.label}`

3. Find: `Continue — {dietTypes.find(d => d.id === selectedDietType)?.label} →`
   Replace with: `Continue — {dietTypes.find(d => d.id === selectedDietType)?.label}`

Do NOT change anything else in the file.

Verify: `npm run build` passes with no TypeScript errors.
